additional_rules.name: missing-injectable-decorator
additional_rules.message: Service class missing @Injectable() decorator — NestJS cannot resolve it as a provider
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add @Injectable() decorator immediately above the class declaration. Import it from '@nestjs/common'.

additional_rules.name: direct-response-send
additional_rules.message: Direct res.send()/res.json() in NestJS controller — return values from the method instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove @Res() injection and return the value directly from the controller method. NestJS serializes the return value automatically. Reserve @Res() for streaming or SSE use cases.

additional_rules.name: any-type-in-dto
additional_rules.message: any type in DTO class — DTOs must be fully typed for ValidationPipe to work correctly
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace 'any' with a specific type or interface. Use 'unknown' if the type is truly dynamic, then narrow it in the service layer.

additional_rules.name: console-log-in-service
additional_rules.message: console.log in NestJS code — use NestJS Logger instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace console.log/warn/error with: private readonly logger = new Logger(ClassName.name); then this.logger.log(...) / this.logger.error(...).

additional_rules.name: direct-process-env-in-service
additional_rules.message: Direct process.env access outside bootstrap — inject ConfigService instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Inject ConfigService from '@nestjs/config' and use this.configService.get<string>('KEY'). Never read process.env directly in services, controllers, or guards.

additional_rules.name: business-logic-in-controller
additional_rules.message: Database call detected directly in controller — delegate data access to a service
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move the database call into a service method and inject the service into the controller. Controllers should only parse requests, delegate to services, and return responses.

additional_rules.name: missing-module-barrel
additional_rules.message: Deep relative import into another module — prefer barrel index.ts imports
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add or update the target module's index.ts to re-export the necessary symbols, then import from the module root: from '../users' instead of '../users/users.service'.

additional_rules.name: controller-naming-convention
additional_rules.message: NestJS @Controller in a file that doesn't follow the *.controller.ts naming convention
additional_rules.fix_hint: Rename the file to follow NestJS naming: feature-name.controller.ts

additional_rules.name: dto-placement
additional_rules.message: DTO class defined outside dto/ directory or *.dto.ts file — co-locate DTOs for discoverability
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move to dto/ directory or rename file to *.dto.ts (e.g., create-user.dto.ts).

additional_boundaries.name: Controllers must not import repositories or entities directly
